metadata.source_policy: Built only from downloaded files under output/RawData. The legacy combined output/eol_database.json is intentionally ignored.

status_definitions.unsupported_status_only: Vendor/source marks the product discontinued or unsupported but no exact date is available.
status_definitions.support_ending_soon: Security/support end date is within 365 days.
status_definitions.end_of_sale: Sales ended, but support appears to continue or is unknown.
status_definitions.vendor_eol_but_supported: Vendor EOL date passed, but a later support date is listed.
status_definitions.supported: Support date is in the future.
status_definitions.supported_status_only: Vendor/source marks the product active/supported without exact dates.
status_definitions.unknown: No usable lifecycle signal was found.
status_definitions.lifecycle_review: Official source indicates EOL/discontinued/lifecycle concern, but security-update status is not confirmed or may conflict with firmware evidence.

license.notice: This database is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License (CC BY-NC 4.0).

interpretation_policy.name: cautious_policy_v2
interpretation_policy.purpose: Prevent EOL/discontinued/end-of-sale sources from being treated as confirmed loss of security updates unless the source explicitly proves that.
interpretation_policy.rule: Ambiguous status-only/discontinued/vendor EOL-list records become lifecycle_review with unknown receives_security_updates.
